Uses of Interface
at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util.Poolable

  • Packages that use Poolable 
    Package Description
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo
    This package contains the classes of the rule based system AntiUnifySystem, the corresponding problem definition AntiUnifyProblem and some standard implementations of a rigidity function (RigidityFncSubsequence, RigidityFncSubstring ).
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data
    This package contains the classes which are needed to build up the term tree.
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util
    This package contains utility classes like the DataStructureFactory which instantiates common data structures like Lists, Maps, Sets.

    • Uses of Poolable in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo

      Classes in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo that implement Poolable 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AlignmentList
      A list of AlignmentList.Alignment elements which is pooled.
      Methods in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo that return Poolable 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Poolable AlignmentList.newObject()

      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  Pool<T extends Poolable>
      A pool of objects of a certain type.

      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  CoordList
      A pooled list of x,y coordinates.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static <T extends Poolable> 
      Pool<T>      		 Pool.getPool(T sample)
      Returns a Pool for a certain type of objects.
      Methods in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util that return Poolable 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Poolable Poolable.newObject()
      This method is called from the Pool if there is no object available to recycle.
      Poolable CoordList.newObject()
